title: Clownpierce Always
description: A Clownpierce texturepack with his stuff
body:
## About this
- this is not a copy ,i textured it alone
- No optifine needed,no rename it shows always
- there will be some bugs but i will fix it
##  What is in it?
- the famous clownpierce sword
- the scythe axe
- 3d totem(will may have bugs)
- Red and black crits
##   To report bugs
There is a link to my disord server

## Join my discord server
- **Why?**: Report bugs or give ideas
- Link: [Click here](https://discord.gg/qVu49UHk7)
